# unstructured_job (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a workflow job.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "unstructured_job" "example" {
  id = "existing-job-uuid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the job.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the job was created.
- `job_type` (String) The type of the job. Possible values: `ephemeral`, `persistent`, `scheduled`, `template`.
- `runtime` (String) The runtime duration of the job.
- `status` (String) The status of the job. Possible values: `SCHEDULED`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `COMPLETED`, `STOPPED`, `FAILED`.
- `workflow_id` (String) The ID of the workflow that owns this job.
- `workflow_name` (String) The name of the workflow that owns this job.
